Haryana Bachelor of Arts Entrance Examin.official_note: Official Directorate of Higher Education (DHE), Haryana centralized online admission portal where BA merit/selection lists are published (via 'Know your result'). Admission is merit-based on Class 12 marks, not a ranked entrance exam, so no opening/closing rank cutoffs exist. Linked from the verified DHE page https://highereduhry.ac.in/forms/WebPages/Admissions; the portal itself failed automated fetch (SSL certificate not verifiable) but is the genuine official source. No third-party portal used.

Haryana Bachelor of Business Administrat.official_note: Same official DHE Haryana centralized online admission portal; BBA merit/selection lists published here. Merit-based on Class 12 marks (no entrance exam ranks). Linked from verified page https://highereduhry.ac.in/forms/WebPages/Admissions. Portal failed automated SSL fetch but is the authoritative source. Replaces the prior third-party shiksha link.

Himachal Pradesh Bachelor of Arts Entran.official_note: Himachal Pradesh University (official .ac.in) admission notices page — UG admission (incl. BA) is merit-based on qualifying-exam marks, with course-wise merit lists released as admission notices by the university/departments; there is no single static BA cutoff table or opening/closing rank. Verified to load and be the official HPU admission notices source. Replaces the prior careers360 generic link.

Himachal Pradesh Bachelor of Business Ad.official_note: Himachal Pradesh University official admission notices page; BBA UG admission is merit-based (qualifying-exam marks) with merit lists published as admission notices. No static cutoff/rank table. Verified official HPU page; replaces the prior third-party shiksha link.

Himachal Pradesh Polytechnic Admission T.official_note: Official Himachal Pradesh Takniki Shiksha Board (HPTSB), Dharamshala PAT results/counselling page (conducting body for the HP Polytechnic Admission Test / HP PAT). Publishes PAT result gazette and seat-allotment/counselling results; e.g. result gazette PDF https://www.hptechboard.com/assets/ckfinder/userfiles/files/Final%20Answer%20Key%20PAT/PAT-2025_Result_.pdf. College/branch closing-rank cutoffs are produced through the counselling/seat-allotment rounds on this portal. Page returns HTTP 403 to automated fetch but is the genuine official source (confirmed via search). More specific than the bare homepage.

Himachal Pradesh Polytechnic Entrance.official_note: Same exam as HP PAT (HP Polytechnic Admission Test) conducted by HPTSB Dharamshala. Official PAT results/counselling page where result gazette and seat-allotment cutoffs are published. Returns HTTP 403 to automated fetch but is the authentic official source; more specific than the homepage.

Indian Institute of Petroleum and Energy.official_note: Official IIPE Visakhapatnam (.ac.in) cutoff page listing B.Tech (JoSAA/JEE-Advanced) and M.Sc category-wise closing ranks by year, with downloadable PDFs e.g. https://iipe.ac.in/Academics/pdf/CUT%20OFF%20RANKS%202024-25.pdf and 2023-24. Verified to load; more specific than the prior admissions.php link. already_has_data=true (source https://iipe.ac.in/Academics/Cutoff.html), so extraction skipped.
